sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106241" key="u(grokollou/ria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑγρο-κολλούρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n106241.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κολλούρια</ref> </xr> (or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κολλύρια</foreign>)<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑγρά,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
